description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a tall, rectangular structure with a slightly angled front face, housing a display screen at the top and a control panel below. The cabinet is predominantly dark in color, accented by blue trim along the edges, giving it a classic retro arcade appearance. The front panel includes a visible screen displaying a game interface, a joystick, and several round buttons arranged for gameplay. Below the control panel, there is a recessed area that likely contains a coin slot and access panel. The side panels are plain and unadorned, with a geometric, angular profile that flares outward at the control area. The back of the cabinet is flat and featureless, emphasizing its utilitarian design. The overall build suggests a sturdy, heavy object typically found in arcades, entertainment venues, or urban recreational spaces.
description: A tall, dark arcade game cabinet with blue trim, a screen, and a control panel featuring a joystick and buttons. The design is angular and retro, with a plain back and sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing the display screen, control panel with joystick and buttons, and a recessed coin slot area.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the angular profile and blue trim, with the control panel and screen partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a flat, featureless back panel with a blue accent strip.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, showing the cabinet's angular shape and blue trim, with partial visibility of the control panel.
attribute_screen_type: CRT, curved, medium-sized with a visible bezel
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one joystick and four round buttons, arranged in a cluster, with a dark color scheme and yellow button accents.
